title: Substack vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Mailgun?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
